name: spec
description: Spec-driven development pipeline (the Boris way): scan a repo for agent-readiness, then take a change from a one-line intent to a mergeable PR through human-gated phases — requirement (EARS) → design (DDD/clean-arch) → tasks (each independently verifiable) → implement (with notes) → review (isolated-context adversarial). Self-contained: bundles the implement phase and the audit rubric. Verification-first, one phase per command, stops at every gate.
